text: NIS2 as new standard. The European NIS2 directive sets requirements for thousands of companies and their chain. During acquisitions, buyers are increasingly looking to see whether the target company meets these requirements – or whether there will be a compliance issue.

text: NIS2 Quality Mark as supporting document. For those looking to prepare for sales or financing, the [NIS2 Quality Mark (QM)](https://nis2qualitymark.eu/) offers a scalable, practical alternative to more stringent standards.

text: Digital security is not only a compliance issue, but also a strategic choice. Anyone who has their digital hygiene in order will retain their value. Take cyber measures yourself or report fraud? About 1 in 5 entrepreneurs is confronted with cybercrime. Such a cyber incident can have major consequences for business operations, customers, suppliers or reputation. Taking appropriate measures is therefore important for every company. Do you have an SME company and do you want to reduce your cyber risks? Then take a look at [Cyber ​​Fundament](https://doorpassen.abnamro.nl/producten-en-diensten/cyber-voor-het-mkb/), especially for SME entrepreneurs. Learn more about the 4-in-1 cyber solution [Cyber ​​Safe & Secure](https://doorpassen.abnamro.nl/producten-en-diensten/cyber-veilig-en-zeker/?icmp=cm-od_article-insights_btn-link) especially for large businesses and reduce your cyber risks.
